case_title: ALEXANDER RYAN VS. GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-12-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RYAN, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY $1,010.38 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,055.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,010.38 FILED BY RYAN, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY RYAN, ALEXANDER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER RYAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2024 - JUDGMENT.
